title: Cudgel (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cudgel''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Cudgel (Lambda-class)|'''''Cudgel''''']], a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]].
*[[Cudgel (weapon)|'''Cudgel''']], a weapon 

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Cudgel (droid)|'''Cudgel''']], a [[Droid/Legends|droid]].
*[[Cudgel (Human)|'''Cudgel''']], a [[Human/Legends|Human]].
*[[Cudgel (weapon)/Legends|'''Cudgel''']], weapon.
